task_completion.description: Select or open the properties for the 'Fells Loop' track.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Fells Loop' track is highlighted in the application's list or its properties window is open.

task_completion.description: Filter the track to a maximum of 500 points.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A filter dialog or track properties window showing the point limit set to 500, or the track properties showing a total point count between 100 and 500.
The track name in the list or properties window is changed to 'Fells_Loop_500'.

task_completion.description: Open the export dialog for the simplified track.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' file dialog window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Export the track as a GPX file to C:\workspace\output\simplified_track.gpx.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The export dialog shows the file name 'simplified_track.gpx', the 'Save as type' set to GPX, and the directory path 'C:\workspace\output\'.

integrity.description: The agent used the application GUI to filter and export the track, rather than terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Garmin BaseCamp menus, dialogs, and track properties, not a command prompt or code editor.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's native export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard file save/export dialog from the application is visible, rather than manually creating a text file and pasting GPX XML data.

integrity.description: The agent modified the track points using the application's filtering tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The track properties window shows a reduced point count (<= 500) confirming the filter was actually applied, rather than just renaming the original track without filtering.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is exactly 'C:\workspace\output\simplified_track.gpx'. The track must be renamed to exactly 'Fells_Loop_500'. The track must be filtered to have a maximum of 500 points (and a minimum of 100 points). The data corresponds to the Middlesex Fells Reservation.
